news.title:
PNB Housing Finance to hold a board meeting on April 20, 2026, to approve FY26 results.
Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hrs post-result declaration per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance to hold a board meeting on April 20, 2026, to approve FY26 results.
Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hrs post-result declaration per SEBI norms.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance approves allotment of 30,000 secured NCDs worth Rs. 300 crore.
NCDs have 3-year tenure, 7.1% initial coupon, then floating rate linked to 3-month T-Bill.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance approves allotment of 30,000 secured NCDs worth Rs. 300 crore.
NCDs have 3-year tenure, 7.1% initial coupon, then floating rate linked to 3-month T-Bill.

news.title:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.
news.summary:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance's MD, CFO, and Head of Investor Relations participated in the Morgan Stanley India Financials Virtual Investor Meeting.
Discussions included business strategy, margins, asset quality, returns, and future outlook; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance's MD, CFO, and Head of Investor Relations participated in the Morgan Stanley India Financials Virtual Investor Meeting.
Discussions included business strategy, margins, asset quality, returns, and future outlook; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance Ltd participated in Axis Capital's India Conference on Feb 10, 2026.
Discussions covered business strategy, margins, asset quality, and future outlook; no sensitive info was shared.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance Ltd participated in Axis Capital's India Conference on Feb 10, 2026.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance participated in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day on Feb 2, 2026.
Discussions included business strategy, margins, asset quality, govt schemes, and outlook; no sensitive info shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
PNB Housing targets growth in affordable, emerging markets to boost margins amid competition from banks in prime loans.
Focus areas include expanding branches, digital channels, and growing loans against property and construction finance portfolios.
news.summary:
PNB Housing targets growth in affordable, emerging markets to boost margins amid competition from banks in prime loans.
Focus areas include expanding branches, digital channels, and growing loans against property and construction finance portfolios.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance plans to re-enter construction finance and developer funding.
The company aims to grow its loan book to ₹1 lakh crore by March 2027.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance plans to re-enter construction finance and developer funding.
The company aims to grow its loan book to ₹1 lakh crore by March 2027.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance shared the audio recording of its Q3 & 9M FY26 analyst presentation.
The recording is available on the company's website, adhering to SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance shared the audio recording of its Q3 & 9M FY26 analyst presentation.
The recording is available on the company's website, adhering to SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance shares fell over 4% as Q3 net interest income missed estimates.
Credit costs remained negative, adding to investor concerns.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance shares fell over 4% as Q3 net interest income missed estimates.
Credit costs remained negative, adding to investor concerns.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance forecasts 17-18% retail book growth.
The company maintains NIM guidance at 3.6-3.7%.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance forecasts 17-18% retail book growth.
The company maintains NIM guidance at 3.6-3.7%.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance identified Rs. 237.4 crore fraud in one borrower account, written off in FY23.
The fraud has no significant impact on finances; legal action is ongoing.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance identified Rs. 237.4 crore fraud in one borrower account, written off in FY23.
The fraud has no significant impact on finances; legal action is ongoing.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance's 9M FY26 net interest margin reached 3.67%, exceeding guidance.
The company had guided a net interest margin range of 3.6-3.7% for FY26.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance's 9M FY26 net interest margin reached 3.67%, exceeding guidance.
The company had guided a net interest margin range of 3.6-3.7% for FY26.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance's gross NPA stable at 1.0% as of Dec 2025.
Retail loan assets rose 16% YoY to INR 81,931 Cr; disbursement grew 16% YoY.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance's gross NPA stable at 1.0% as of Dec 2025.
Retail loan assets rose 16% YoY to INR 81,931 Cr; disbursement grew 16% YoY.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance Q3 net profit rose to ₹5.2B from ₹4.83B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹21.2B compared to ₹19.42B YoY.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance Q3 net profit rose to ₹5.2B from ₹4.83B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹21.2B compared to ₹19.42B YoY.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance approved unaudited Q3 and 9M FY26 results reviewed by joint auditors.
Trading window reopens 48 hours after results declaration, with detailed disclosures included.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance approved unaudited Q3 and 9M FY26 results reviewed by joint auditors.

Earnings updates include Dr Reddy's, HPCL, KEI Industries, and PNB Housing Finance.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance Ltd to host Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 22, 2026, at 8:00 AM IST.
Investor presentation will be shared before the event; call details and pre-registration links provided.

news.title:
PNB Housing approved allotment of 37,500 secured NCDs worth Rs 375 crore.
NCDs have a 5-year tenure, 7.5% interest rate, and maturity in Jan 2031.
news.summary:

news.title:

Improved asset quality trends anticipated for NBFCs in the same period.
